title: Texas Pacific (TPL) Soars 4.2%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: Texas Pacific (TPL) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: These Dividend Stocks Can Double Your Money in Under 5 Years
text: These exceptional stocks represent the convergence of rising revenues, growing dividends, and unique operating niches.

title: Horizon Kinetics  1st/2nd Quarter Interim Commentary
text: Horizon Kinetics LLC, founded in 1994, is an independently owned and operated investment adviser. With a long-term absolute return mindset, and based on first-hand research, our portfolios tend to be concentrated and avoid tracking or mimicking any benchmark or index.
